reviews.title: Owner charged card after canceling
reviews.text: I booked and within 1 hour canceled due to change of plan. Policy before booking say free cancellation but still charge. This type of homestay is what I always tried to avoid.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Very friendly host, many complimentary stuff, good location near the bus station. A WinMart shop and a pagoda are less than a hundred meters away
reviews.negatives: Toilet flushing was not working well. As a result a bad smell in entire room. A desk was a bit small to work on a laptop. Also expect many mosquitos at night

reviews.title: Good value
reviews.text: Great value for the price and helpful staff.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
It's what you want in a guesthouse, clean, tidy nice room with natural light and fresh air and it's nicely priced. 

Ricky the host was there to pick me up at the bus station and was always there to help out and prompt at answering any questions I had. 

Thanks Ricky.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Only negative is kitchen area made for midgets!😂

reviews.title: Ricky was fabulously helpful.
reviews.positives: The location was great for me to walk to the shuttle bus to take me to the pier.  And there was a bus station close as well.  The Main Street is right there and yet you are back away from it and the property is very secure .  My room was very good.  I slept well.  The mattress was thin so I am not sure how other people might feel but it was good for me.

reviews.title: Helpful, friendly and basic room with good location for onwards travel to Con Dao
reviews.text: Friendly and helpful couple running the place. Great location if you are using the Superdong connection from Soc Trang to Tran De port, can walk over in the morning. Cheap basic rooms for a short stay for onwards travel to Con Dao

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Wonderful room, very clean and nicely decorated, probably the best where i have been in Vietnam, compared even to some hotels.
Even if breakfast is not included the owner is very nice and there are biscuits, water and coffee available for free for everyone.
Nice location, able to walk around. 
Absolutely recommended!!!

reviews.title: Very helpful
reviews.text: Simple room but good value for money. The owner were very helpful. He organized bus tickets, booked taxi, suggested what to see and where to eat etc.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Rick is an amazing host, we got bikes to rent and place is very cozy. Felt like at home. Very good location.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Hidden Homestay!! Very affordable and I actually felt very welcomed from the owner, he is very nice. It was a last minute order actually but the owner rush to welcome me once I arrived. I would definitely come again!

reviews.title: Excellent little Guesthouse.
reviews.positives: Excellent place for budget travellers and backpackers. It's not finished yet, so for now there is no garden or kitchen, but they are definitely working towards something good here at this backpacker friendly place. The room was really nice. Clean, cozy and homely with a comfortable bed. Nice bathroom with a hot shower. I really liked that the washbasin was in the room and not in the bathroom. Kettle and coffee in the room. Free water. Free bicycle, (and it was a good one), so you can easily see all the sights. Scooter for rent. My room had a little balcony where it even was a little table and a chair. The WiFi was very good. Excellent location close to the bus station for those early morning departures. Supermarket and a row of no less than 4 temples right across the street. Beer and sodas for sale, in the fridge on the 2nd floor. I booked 3 nights, which was good, because Soc Trang had surprisingly many nice things to see.

reviews.title: nice stay in soc trang
reviews.text: room was comfortable, bathroom was clean & Ricky the host is really friendly and helped us with organising our transfer early in the next morning :)

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Ricky is terrific and very welcoming. Thanks for the stay!

reviews.title: Wonderful stay, rare find in Soc Trang
reviews.text: I wanted to try it out and ended up kinda like the place. Don't let the 1-star review gang discourage you from coming here. Would def come back/recommend people on future stay.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Everything was so pleasant and nice, like having your own little home far from home. Owners are extremely friendly and take such good care of you.

reviews.title: Perfect for local exploration
reviews.text: The landlord is of so kind & pretty much supportive. My stay of 2 nights - 3 days is enjoyable and cost effective. In brief, centre’s location with economical cost and affordable motor renting price.

reviews.title: Extremely good value accomodation driven by a lovely family in a very charming Mekong Delta town
reviews.positives:
Very helpful and welcoming host family who really wants to make your stay enjoyable.
Easy to communicate in English, lot's of local information regarding food, travel, sightseeing and onward connection available. Very nicely decorated room with a big and comfortable bed, good AC and WiFi, clean bathroom with hot shower. Bicycle available to go around town. Cold drinks available for a very reasonable price.
Located in walking distance to the local busstation and the Superdong office where you can catch a shuttle bus to the ferry terminal.
Soc Trang is a very interesting city in the Mekong Delta region which does not see that many foreign tourists. People everywhere are extremely friendly and helpful and it's really worth to stay a couple of days here if you enjoy getting away from the tourist crowds.
reviews.negatives: Not being able to stay here again when I returned to Soc Trang from Con Dao.

reviews.title: Lovely owner & place
reviews.text: Fair price and good location. Free use of fridge & kitchen which is nice. The owner is soooo friendly and helpful!!

reviews.title: Great guest house for an overnight or more
reviews.positives:
We stayed twice at Ricky's and Amy's. We liked it so much on our way to Con Dao that we decided to stay there again on our way back and take time to visit the beautiful city of Soc Trang.
Their place is clean, comfortable and perfectly located for your trip to Con Dao and on the way back to catch a bus to Can Tho or HCM city.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Mauvais
reviews.text: Ce n'est pas un guest house. Les photos sont faux. Nous avons le lit fabriqué avec des palettes.Les toilettes sont sales et commun. Vous ne voyez personne pour communiquer seulement par wattsap ou zalo.Je ne conseille pas cet endroit

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.negatives: Está pegado a un karaoke y hasta las 11pm están con la música a todo volumen por lo que es molesto estar en la habitación...por lo demás todo bien.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Petit coin paisible et sympa au milieux du tumulte. Son hôte est vraiment gentil, professionnel, et très attentionné.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: La atencion del personal

reviews.title: Sehr hilfsbereit und freundlich
reviews.text:
Danke für die eine Nacht in Soc Trăng!
Uns wurde geholfen, als wir weiter nach Bên Tre wollten.

reviews.title: Un anfitrion fantástico!
reviews.positives:
Habitación amplia y comoda. Buena ubicación cerca de restaurantes, cafeterías y supermarket, y también de la estación de autobuses Futabus.
Hay a disposición una cocina con microondas, hervidor y vajillas. Hay café, noodles y agua ofrecida por la instalación. También hay refrescos fríos (de pago).
Destaca el excelente trato de Ricky, un fantástico anfitrión que te ayuda con todo.
reviews.negatives: La habitación un poco ruidosa, pero se duerme bien

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Extrem hilfsbereite und nette Gastgeber!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Las habitaciones y la cocina exterior

reviews.title: We've visited twice and would come again
reviews.text: Truly nothing much to add. Amazing host who has been nothing but kind and helpful! Also, beautiful view from the top Appartment. 10/10 would recommend.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Réservation annulée par le propriétaire une heure avant notre arrivée

reviews.title: Super nette Besitzer!
reviews.text: Die Unterkunft war minimalistisch aber es gab alles was man braucht und für eine Nacht ist es absolut okay, vorallem zu dem Preis! Die Besitzer waren so freundlich! Sie haben uns Tipps gegeben und am nächsten Morgen den Weg zur Busstation gezeigt. Alles top und sehr weiterzuempfehlen!

reviews.title: uniquement si vous êtes obligés !
reviews.negatives:
La décoration est de bric et de broc
La qualité des équipements est médiocre.
Tout est fait à l'économie

reviews.title: Great Homestay, greater Host
reviews.text:
To all who play with the though of stopping by in Soc Trang, you might want to extend your stay here because we didn't but regretted it immediately upon our arrival. Not only does everything leave nothing to be desired really, you get one of the most thoughtful and nicest hosts we have met.
Thank you dearly for everything!

reviews.title: Je ne reviendrai pas
reviews.positives: La nuit était pas cher. La propriétaire a essayé de nous donner quelques informations, mais la communication est difficile en anglais.
reviews.negatives:
LE BRUIT. Jusqu'à 1h du matin des personnes se sont préparés à manger dans le coin cuisine juste en face de notre chambre. 
J'aurais également souhaité que les propriétaires nous informe qu'ils débutent les travaux à 7h du matin. Je ne recommande pas ce logement.

reviews.title: no complaints
reviews.text: clean and cozy! nothing to complain about at all!

reviews.title: Assez bien pour une nuit
reviews.positives: Nous avons aimé la grande chambre lumineuse et la vue. Il y avait une belle décoration. L'emplacement de la chambre est à seulement 6 minutes à pied de la navette superdong.
reviews.negatives: La chambre était sale : sol avec des taches, lavabo sale, recoins poussiéreux et salle de bain très sale.

reviews.title: おすすめ
reviews.text: Rickyさんはいつでもzaloでお返事くれ、熱心に対応してくれる気さくな方です。立地もよく、バイクも借りれます。部屋も掃除されている印象です。

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Hôte très sympathique. Et le prêt de vélo pour visiter
reviews.negatives: La qualité du matelas était très inconfortable. Le fait que la chambre, sûr un côté du mur, n’ai pas vitre (uniquement moustiquaire) fait qu’on entend les voisins et de la route

reviews.title: 体验当地人生活的好地方
reviews.text: 在一个居民区，交通方便（距巴士站步行不到十分钟），有一个公用厨房和冰箱，有免费的面条和咖啡可以品尝，室外环境凉爽，可以尽情发呆。

reviews.title: Pour les routards essentiellement
reviews.positives: L’accueil
reviews.negatives: Le matelas est très dur, les équipements de petite qualité ainsi que la salle d’eau

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Đặt phòng ngày lễ trên agoda,nếu không tin khách có thể thanh toán tiền trước mà,sao để tới khi khách đt nhận phòng thì bảo sợ trên agoda khách ảo,10khách đều ảo 10 vậy coi lại cách của mình….tệ mọi người nên né ks này và agoda nên có cách quản lý bên đối tác để ko phiền,khó cho khách (rất ko thoải mái khi đặt mà ko nhận đc phòng còn nói sợ khách ảo)

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Communication très agréable, hôte très réactif et arrangeant, il nous a emmené en voiture au ferry le matin pour très peu d’argent, ce qui était beaucoup plus simple que la navette superdong. Il nous a préparé un petit déjeuner à emporter, le soir on nous a offert des fruits.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Tự ý huỷ phòng với lí do không chính đáng

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Tout
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: Thân thiện
reviews.text: Chổ này ở yên tĩnh, phù hợp cho đại số khách du lịch

reviews.title: Très bon rapport qualité prix
reviews.positives:
Le lieu au calme 
La cuisine collective avec petites attentions 
Le personnel très serviable 
Plein de petits détails bien pensés
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Phòng sạch sẽ đầy đủ, staff nhiệt tình
Hơi nhiều muỗi xíu

reviews.title: Très agréable !
reviews.positives: Déco et aménagement du lieu très agréable et mignon. Tout est propre et Ricky est très sympathique et prévenant. Bons restos végétariens-véganes à proximité.
reviews.negatives: Quelques détails qui ne gâchent pas l’ensemble mais pourraient améliorer : petite fuite d’eau dans la salle de douche, les serviettes de bain dans une matière synthétique pas très agréable, manque un miroir au lavabo.

reviews.title: Ổn
reviews.text: Anh chị chủ ks nhiệt tình 10 điểm

reviews.title: Bon rapport qualité prix, mais lit pas très confortable
reviews.positives:
Bon rapport qualité prix,
Bien situé
reviews.negatives: Lit inconfortables

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Anh chị chủ nhiệt tình, có đồ ăn vặt cho khách, có bếp nấu riêng, sạch sẽ.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Très pratique car central, face à une belle pagode, et proche du bus pour aller au port et prendre le bateau pour Con Dao. 
Propre, climatisé.  Il y a même une terrasse pour y siroter une bière ou un café. 
Assez bon rapport qualité-prix.
reviews.negatives:
Service minimum du gérant. 
La chambre du 2eme étage est pratique mais cheap.

reviews.title: Очень много комаров в комнате
reviews.text: Хорошая комната, для одной ночи. Есть всё необходимое. Мини кухня на территории, чистая ванная комната. Единственный минус в комнате было очен очень очень много комаров.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Ricky a essayer de nous arranger le trajet entre Can Tho et Soc Trang mais ça n'a pas bien fonctionné et nous avons beaucoup stressé. Le bus a eu du retard et le chauffeur ne nous a pas attendu 1 mn après l'heure du rdv.
reviews.negatives: La chambre à juste le confort minimum pour une nuit. Rien n'est prévu pour le petit-déjeuner. Un sachet de thé ou de café, ce serait bien.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Замечательное и красивое место для отдыха. Очень удобное расположение - хочешь пешком, хочешь - на байке. Очень чистый номер - прибираются ежедневно. Гостеприимные хозяева с хорошим настроением - всегда помогут и подскажут, хозяйка часто поет, красиво кстати.

reviews.title: Localisation parfaite, hôte super sympa, confort ok.
reviews.positives: Localisation parfaite, l'hôte Ricky était génial et serviable, il m'a recommandé plusieurs endroits et m'a même prêté son scooter! Merci Ricky!
reviews.negatives: L'airco n'était pas super performant et j'ai eu des moustiques dans la chambre, mais ce n'est pas évident d'éviter cela à la campagne je pense, donc dans l'ensemble je recommande cet établissement!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: OK

reviews.title: Bon emplacement, super hôte
reviews.positives: L'hôte est très sympa et aide volontiers. La chambre était confortable. L'emplacement central et proche de la gare des bus est idéal!
reviews.negatives: Malheureusement il y avait des moustiques et donc ça n'est pas le mieux pour dormir. Mais sinon c'était bien pour une nuit!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Hôtes adorables et chambre très sympa!
reviews.negatives: Mon matelas n'était pas confortable.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Le propriétaire était très très gentil! Il m’a trouvé une voiture à partager avec d’autres personnes pour faire mon trajet Cần Thơ - Sóc Trăng alors que je ne trouvais pas de bus. Je recommande ce logement qui est de très bon rapport qualité prix

reviews.title: L'endroit parfait pour visiter Soc Trang
reviews.positives: Tres bel homestay, bien situé, la chambre était très jolie, parfait pour visiter Soc Trang, les conseils du propriétaire pour le diner très appréciable
reviews.negatives: rien

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Les hostes sont présents et la pour vous aider ,très réactifs 
La maison est super mimi
Super bien placé pour partir vers Con Dao

reviews.title: Atypique et charmant
reviews.positives:
Ricky et sa femme sont soucieux de votre bien être.
Le homestay est situé dans une petite rue au calme  à 6 minutes de l'agence bateau superdong et de la station de bus.
Il y a une petite cuisine extérieure avec terrasse agréable 
La chambre et surtout la douche étaient propres  
Ricky nous a été d'une grande aide pour notre bus et pour louer un scooter.

reviews.title: Très bon séjour
reviews.positives:
Nous avons adoré l'accueil et tout a été fait pour que l'on se sente bien.
On a été très bien conseillé et pris en charge avec le transport depuis Can tho.
La chambre est spacieuse et lumineuse.
reviews.negatives: Nous avons été dérangé par le bruit continu dans la rue de notre arrivée à 12h jusqu'à minuit mais il n'y était pour rien. Nous n'avons pas pu nous reposer comme nous le voulions mais on ne peut rien dire.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Nous avons apprécié son accueil chaleureux, le fait qu'il nous laisse accès à sa cuisine pour le petit déjeuner. 
Il nous a proposé un circuit de visite. Grâce à lui on a pu optimiser le peu de temps que l'on avait pour visiter la ville.
La situation est idéale pour les prendre la navette Superdong située à quelques centaines de mètres.
reviews.negatives: Son absence lors de notre départ pour régler le séjour.

reviews.title: Parfait, je recommande
reviews.positives: La gentillesse des propriétaires de l'hôtel

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Rickie et sa femme sont très sympathiques et très serviables. Nous les remercions pour cet hébergement.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Le proprietaire est super gentil, il nous a aidé a prendre nos billets de bateau. Il y a une cuisine avec plein de choses en libre service. C’est une attention vraiment sympa.

reviews.title: Calme, accueillant, pratique,...
reviews.positives:
Ricky m’a assuré un accueil parfait dans son Homestay, où je me suis bien reposé, loin du bruit des grandes avenues, et après de longs parcours à vélo dans la campagne autour de Soc Trung... Merci pour le prêt gratuit du vélo...
Je recommande vivement ce logement tout près de la gare de bus...

reviews.title: Idéal
reviews.positives:
Ricky est vraiment adorable, il nous a contacté à l’avance pour pouvoir organiser notre venue. La chambre était conforme aux photos et tout était propre. Nous n’avons dormi qu’une seule nuit, mais l’emplacement était idéal pour nous.
Ricky nous a aidé à louer un scooter et nous a fait une réduction car la journée était déjà bien entamée. J’ai oublié mes boucles d’oreilles dans le logement et il a tout fait pour que je puisse les récupérer !

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: L’accueil est au top 👌 l’emplacement et les équipements aussi. La communication via wattsapp est super 👍 la chambre est bien décorée car il y a une touche personnelle, elle ne ressemble pas à une chambre d’hôtel. Biscuits, eau et café en libre service.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: La rue est calme et l'hôte prévenant.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Séjour reposant dans un lieu bien aménagé par des hôtes anglophones.

reviews.title: Séjour reposant.
reviews.positives:
Les hôtes accueillants parlent anglais.
Le logement est cosy, on s'y sent très bien.
Pas de bruit pour dormir.
Séjour reposant.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Tout était très propre et très mignon ! On se sent chez soi . Merci

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Ricky EDT une personne à votre écoute. Il vous
aide dans vos recherches.

reviews.title: L'excellence !!!
reviews.positives: Tout :  l'accueil,  la gentillesse, la serviabilité des jeunes hôtes vraiment aux petits soins, l'emplacement, la cuisine dans le jardin qui permet de se préparer ou réchauffer et il y a toujours à notre disposition du café des gâteaux. J'avais lu tous les compliments des autres personnes.... tout a était dit. C'est vraiment exceptionnel. Très bon rapport qualité prix. Location d'un scooter puissant j'ai pu faire environ 130 km à vive allure à prix également exceptionnel. Prêt d'un vélo qui m'a permis de me balader à SOC TRANG de Pagodes en pagodes. Je n'ai pas perdu de temps. Le vélo le jour de mon arrivée, le scooter le lendemain jour de mon départ. Vraiment SUPER 👍
reviews.negatives: Rien même la météo était parfaite

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: L'accueil, la chambre très propre, les équipements, location de scooter sur place. A 9min a pied de la station de bus pour rejoindre le bateau qui se rend a Con Dao.

reviews.title: Super accueil, bon emménagement je recommande
reviews.positives: Ricky est vraiment sympa, il est disponible. il nous à trouvé un scooter à louer pour deux jours livraison à la chambre. il nous à arranger notre transfert  vers Chau Doc. l emplacement de l établissement est très bien, l'accueil super. il y a une petite terrasse en hauteur pour prendre le petit déjeuner et boire une bière le soir. Encore merci Michel
reviews.negatives: ras

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Au top! Super accueil rapide et efficace. Prêt de vélo gratuit et instructions pour voir les pagodes. Gâteaux à grignoter et eau en libre service. Aide pour prendre le bateau. Chambre impeccable et spacieuse. Vraiment au top pour un coût très très raisonnable.
reviews.negatives: Tout est parfait !

reviews.title: Parfait
reviews.positives:
L’accueil de Amy et Ricky parfait. À disposition j’avais des fruits et de l’eau. Ils m’ont donné les informations pour revenir du port.
Ils m’ont même envoyé un message dans la soirée pour savoir si le lézard était parti de la chambre, et si tout allait bien.
La chambre était très bien aussi, eau chaude, climatisation.
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Le personnel étaient incroyable ,vraiment  et le matelas du lit  !! Même chez moi J en ai pas aussi confortable ! Pour le Vietnam C est juste le super luxe pour moi

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
- en +++ = l'accueil !! Ricky est au petit soin et vous facilite le voyage en tout point !
- Vaste appartement bien équipé et propre pour 4 adultes
- quartier très calme 
- nombreux restaurants à proximité (dont 1 dans la rue juste derrière qui fait de délicieux Lẩu !)
reviews.negatives: Rien !

reviews.title: Parfait après le retour de Con Dao également. Propre et très bien équipé. Hôtes exceptionels.
reviews.positives: Preuve que nous avons aimé ce homestay,  je laisse ce second commentaire car nous sommes revenu après avoir été à l'archipel Con Dao, cette fois juste une nuit pour repartir ensuite à Rach Gia. La gare de bus est juste à côté de la maison et même un peu plus proche que le lieu de départ pour Con Dao, quel chance ! Dans mon premier commentaire je n'en avais pas fait mention, mais quand on est venu pour la première fois, le bus nous avait déposé loin de la ville, heureusement notre hôte nous avait envoyé un taxi qui était à moitié prix de ceux qui s'étaient précipités vers nous alors que nous n'avions pas encore le pied à terre. Aussi si vous allez à Con Dao, pensez à passer à la pharmacie pour prendre un médicament pour la traversée qui est très très agitée même par beau temps.
reviews.negatives: Avec du recul je pense que nous aurions dû rester quelques jours de plus à Soc Trang, la ville est vaste et le temple Chùa Quan Âm Linh Ứng aurait mérité une nouvelle visite car le lieu est super agréable, entouré de verdure et de calme.

reviews.title: Parfait pour visiter Soc Trang ses temples et poursuivre sur Con Dao après quelques jours
reviews.positives: La maison se situe prêt de plusieurs temples, on a loué un scooter pour visiter les temples dans les environs et pour se rendre à pied dans le centre ville c'est aussi possible. à Pied également on peut se rendre à l'agence où acheter des billets pour les Îles Con Dao et le car qui amène au bateau s'y trouve également donc c'est parfait. La maison est propre, le propriétaire et sa femme sont très sympathiques et parlent anglais. Nous avons trouvé la maison calme. Proche de la maison il y avait un restaurant végétarien très bon et bon marché.
reviews.negatives: rien à ajouter, dans la maison toute équipée il y avait même des petits gâteaux à disposition, on a manqué de rien.

reviews.title: Venez en touriste, repartez en ami.
reviews.positives: Amy et Ricky sont des hôtes exceptionnels. Comme le futa bus de Can Tho ne desservait pas le centre ville mais vous dépose en périphérie à 4km, Ricky est venu me chercher en moto. On se croirait chez des amis, couple serviable toujours disposé à vous aider.
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Chambre confortable et personnel très sympathique

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Sehr netter Besitzer, Gute Lage. Günstiger Preis.
reviews.negatives:
Leider war das Zimmer schrecklich. Es wurde überhaupt icht geputzt. Der Schreibtisch war schmutzig. Da etwas Süßes auf dem Schreibtisch pickte, war der Schreibtisch voller Ameisen. 
Ebenso war das Bett sehr schmutzig. Die Bettdecke war voller Flecken und es befand sich ebenso lange Haare daruf. Uns kam es vor als hätte dort kurz vorher jemand anderer geschlafen. 
Bitte mehr auf Sauberkeit achten.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Das Preis-Leistungsverhältnis ist gut. Die Lage ist gut - nahe Superdong - für Stopover auf dem Weg nach Con Dao. Das Team ist sehr nett und hilfsbereit. Wer eine günstige Übernachtung sucht und am Tag drauf ganz früh die Fähre (Superdong) nach Con Dao nehmen muss, kann hier zugreifen.
reviews.negatives: Es ist alles ein wenig improvisiert, da das eigentliche Guesthouse renoviert wird. Das Zimmer war OK (zu dem Preis), aber nur für eine Nacht.

reviews.title: Top!
reviews.positives: Waren lediglich für eine Nacht dort für auf die Fähre, Aufenthalt war top, wir hatten alles was wir brauchten, gibt sogar noch kostenlose Noodlesoups vor Ort bei später Ankunft

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Gute Lage 
 Freundlicher Gastgeber. Hat die Tickets für das Schnellboot für uns vorbestellt.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Ricky war sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Ich war eine Nacht auf der Durchreise hier und es hat alles gestimmt. Für eine Nacht super. Mir wurde für die Weiterreise der Transport unkompliziert organisiert und gute Essenstips gegeben!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Das Zimmer war schön
reviews.negatives: Leider ist die Lagebeschreibung nicht korrekt, so dass es sehr schwer zu finden ist

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Nah am Busbahnhof und dem Fährbüro, von wo aus der Shuttle zum Fähranleger nach Con Dao geht. Sehr nettes Personal.

reviews.title: Für einen Zwischenstopp in Ordnung
reviews.positives: Sehr hilfsbereiter Besitzer, der für uns den Transport zum Fährterminal organisiert hat.

reviews.title: Überbrückung für Fähre nach Con Dao
reviews.positives: Zentral gelegen und sehr bequeme Matratze! Mit Fruchtschale begrüsst ☺️

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Ricky und Amy sind nette und hilfreiche Gastgeber.
reviews.negatives: Gibt nichts

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Der Besitzer ist sehr hilfsbereit und gab gute Hinweise. Die Unterkunft liegt in einem ruhigen Viertel.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Ricky war außerordentlich nett. Es gab kostenlose Snacks und Wasser, andere Getränke standen gegen einen kleinen Aufpreis bereit. Die Unterkunft ist fußläufig vom Busbahnhof zu erreichen, ebenso das Büro der Shuttle Busse, mit denen man auf die Con Dao Inseln kommt.
reviews.negatives: Es gab leider viele Ameisen im Zimmer und in der Küche. Das Bad war auch nicht extrem sauber, aber für den Preis war es wirklich in Ordnung.

reviews.title: Gerne wieder 👌👍
reviews.positives: Sehr komfortabel, netter Betreiber. Viele Annehmlichkeiten, wie freier Kaffee, Instantnudeln, Bonbons und Trinkwasser 👍👍
reviews.negatives: Etwas nervig mit den Schlössern am Haupteingang

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Ricky und Amy waren super freundlich, jederzeit erreichbar und sehr sehr hilfsbereit. Das Zimmer war sehr gemütlich und man hat die Möglichkeit, sich Kaffee und Tee zu machen und auch etwas zu kochen.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Super schönes Hostel für eine Nacht in Sog Trang. Ganz hervorzuheben ist der nette Ricky. Gutes Preisleistungsverhaeltnis.
reviews.negatives: Gab nichts, ach doch, ein paar mehr Tassen für einen Café, wären nicht schlecht 😉

reviews.title: Sehr zufrieden
reviews.positives:
Alles war sehr sauber, es gab kostenlos Wasser, Kaffee und kleine Snacks.
Auch ein Fahrrad konnte man sich auch ausleihen und die Klimaanlage war sehr leise.
Ricky ist ein toller Typ und sehr hilfsbereit bei Fragen oder Unterstützung für Buchungen.
reviews.negatives: Alles gut :)

reviews.title: Preiswerte Unterkunft und netter Gastgeber
reviews.positives: Sehr netter Gastgeber. Sehr hilfsbereit.Preiswertes Zimmer. Für eine Nacht um von hier zur Fähre zu gelangen ideal. Vielen Dank für den tollen Service.
reviews.negatives: Alles war gut.

reviews.title: Gepflegte Unterkunft mit sehr guter Preis-Leistung
reviews.positives:
Im Hostelstyl geführte Unterkunft mit kleiner Gemeinschaftsküche, Kühlschrank, Motorräderparkplatz gratis Wasser und Biskuits.
Freundliche Besitzer, ruhig von der Hauptstraße zurück versetzt, sehr sauber, warmes Wasser und Shampoos/Gel zum Duschen.
Absolut empfehlenswert mit Einkaufs- und Verpflegungsmöglichkeiten in Gehdistanz.
reviews.negatives: Zu üppige Stofftieredeko belegt die praktischen Ablageflächen im Zimmer.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Sehr netter host

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Good location & best of the best service 10 !!!!
+ Die Gastgeber waren sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Ricky hat uns mit unserem Shuttle Bus geholfen aufgestanden um uns Frühstück zu machen und zum Bus zu bringen.

reviews.title: Alles super! Hatten einen rundum angenehmen Aufenthalt :)
reviews.positives: Sehr freundliche Gastgeber, die uns auch mit der Buchung eines Shuttles zur Fähre geholfen haben, gemütliches und sauberes Zimmer, sogar kleine Snacks, Wasser und Noodles for free :). Schöne rooftop Terasse! Gerne wieder!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Ottimo rapporto qualità/prezzo. Buona posizione un po' decentrata, ma consente di raggiungere il centro a piedi. Frigo comune a disposizione.
reviews.negatives: Cucina comune su terrazza scoperta soggetta a pioggia, ai limiti della decenza come pulizia. Mancanza totale cambio biancheria e pulizia stanza. Le foto non corrispondono alla stanza assegnata. Scale ripide.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Ricky è molto gentile. La struttura è ok. Rientra nello standard Vietnamita. Ci ha fornito di 2 biciclette per i nostri giri.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: I gestori parlano bene inglese, sono stati gentili e disponibili.

reviews.title: Ottima opzione!
reviews.positives: Ottima scelta per quanto riguarda la logistica. Vicina alla stazione dei bus, e soprattutto alla biglietteria e punto si raccolta di Superdong ( traghetto per Con Dao). Proprietaria accogliente, disponibile. A disposizione degli ospiti acqua, cracker di riso e istant noodles! Non da dieci la pulizia, ad ogni modo più che sufficiente. Aria condizionata funzionante, letto comodo, bagno accettabile e terrazza fantastica per la birretta serale!!!
reviews.negatives: Un occhio in più alla pulizia!

reviews.title: Ottimo!
reviews.positives: Super disponibili e accoglienti! Frank e Amy ti fanno davvero sentire a casa. Molto disponibili per i consigli. Camera più bella rispetto alle foto. Posizione comoda per chi come noi deve prendere il bus per Tran de port, per prendere poi il Soperdong per Con Dao Island. Acqua gratis e aria condizionata e acqua calda funzionanti.
reviews.negatives: Unica pecca: sanitari non troppo puliti. Ma grazie alla loro gentilezza ci si passa sopra!

reviews.title: Così fantastico
reviews.positives:
+ Bellissima guesthouse situata in una strada tranquilla a 5 minuti a piedi dalla stazione degli autobus e a 7 minuti a piedi dalla stazione ferroviaria di Superdong.
+ L'host è disponibile a fornire informazioni agli ospiti. La stanza è pulita e ordinata. È possibile chiedere al proprietario di aggiungere coperte extra o di cambiare le lenzuola del materasso e di pulire la stanza ogni giorno.
+ Grande frigorifero in comune, possibilità di cucinare autonomamente su una piccola terrazza, noodles istantanei gratuiti, caffè latte.
+ 2 biciclette gratuite per visitare alcuni templi. così fantastico
reviews.negatives:
Nessun problema
Rispetto alla foto sulla pagina di prenotazione, la camera è bella.✍️

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Guesthouse molto carina situata in una stradina tranquilla a 15 minuti a piedi dal centro. Il proprietario è disponibile per fornire informazioni agli ospiti. La camera è pulita e ben organizzata. Si può cucinare su una piccola terrazza.

reviews.title: Goede communicatie
reviews.positives: Contact met eigenaar ging soepel via de whatsapp en op vertrouwen

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Heel vriendelijke host, kamer is net en comfortabel. Prijs-kwaliteit zit heel goed. Je mag ook gratis gebruik maken van een keukentje, wat ook wel handig is.

reviews.title: 清潔
reviews.positives: オーナーが親切で部屋も清潔でした
reviews.negatives: 場所が不便でした。

reviews.title: Soc Trangで宿泊するならココです‼︎
reviews.positives: とても快適な滞在でした。
reviews.negatives: 管理スタッフが常時いないので、外門はダイヤル式のカギを都度開閉する必要あり。

reviews.title: 會再回來
reviews.positives: 民宿主人從預定之後就會主動聯絡，行程上的問題都能詢問，讓不確定性降到最低，不論是交通接駁，預定巴士都讓行程變得很順利，英文溝通也不成問題。位置就在市中心，是探索城市的停留地點，下次會來多待幾天。

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: 가성비 좋아요

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: 老板很热情，如果出去玩有什么问题可以随时联系他
reviews.negatives: 房里有很多飞虫，

reviews.title: 房东热情，值得入住
reviews.positives: 热情好客的主人将为您带来特别的住宿体验。 + 房东友善慷慨，非常乐于助人且友好。气氛温馨，花园可爱，食物美味。我喜欢住在这里。瑞奇和艾米是可以想象到的最好的主人。无线网络空调工作正常。除了乘坐渡轮之外，朔庄还有很多值得一看和可以做的事情。他们将帮助您探索这个美妙的三角洲小镇。

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: 14g nhận phòng, nhưng 11g chủ nhà nghỉ mới gọi báo không còn phòng và nhờ kiếm nơi lưu trú khác. Bó tay!!!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Phòng rộng rãi, khang trang, tivi có youtube
reviews.negatives: Nhà vệ sinh rất hôi, phải đóng lại mới ngủ được. Chủ home tỏ ra quan tâm thân thiện nhưng nói chuyện khá vô duyên, đào sâu đời tư khá nhiều. Đồ ăn, nước suối ghi là free nhưng lúc nào cũng hết.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Sự nhiệt tình của anh chị chủ
reviews.negatives: Tiện nghi trong phòng còn ít, nhà tắm riêng

reviews.title: Khá ổn
reviews.positives: Khá gần trung tâm, Anh/Chị chủ phục vụ rất nhiệt tình, giá khá ổn!
reviews.negatives: Phòng khá nhỏ, không có cách âm tốt cho lắm, không có nhà tắm cà tolet riêng!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Anh chủ tận tình. Cần hỗ trợ là a sẵn sàng hỗ trợ. Phòng sạch tuy nhiên liệu máy lạnh ở chỗ anh hơi cũ=))) chạy hơi chậm, k mát cho lắm phải có thêm quạt thì phòng mới có cảm giác lạnh quéo😀
reviews.negatives:
Cây cối trang trí, và vật dụng trang trí xung quanh hơi bẩn, bụi. K có gì để checkin giới thiệu homestay của anh. 
Lần đầu tới thấy cửa cũ cứ nghĩ bị đào lửa cũm rén=))))

reviews.title: Đánh giá rất ok, 8/10 điểm

reviews.negatives: Cầu thang hơi thấp

reviews.negatives: Wifi ban ngày chạy mượt, tối khi khách về đông thì wifi hơi chậm một chút lúc tầm 10h tối trở đi.

reviews.negatives: Ga giường và khăn tắm nên thay mới khi có khách đến nhận phòng

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.negatives: Không có

reviews.title: Khá tốt
reviews.positives: Nằm gần đường lớn nhưng khá yên tĩnh, không gian thoải mái.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Nơi đây có sẵn một không gian rất dễ thương nếu như tỉ mỉ hơn nữa sẽ rất tuyệt vời,anh chị chủ thì dễ chịu lắm luôn,mình hỏi thanh toán tiền cho anh chị thì chị nói lúc em đi cứ để đại là được không sao đâu
reviews.negatives: Một tầng hai phòng nhà vệ sinh chung nên mình thấy hơi bất tiện,cưả phòng và cửa ban công cảm giác rất dễ leo vào nên mình hơi sợ.Chỉ nói cảm nhận của mình chứ không có ý chê gì hết ạ.

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Anh chị chủ rất thân thiện và dễ gần. Họ chỉ cho mình nhiều chỗ ngon.
reviews.negatives: Vì còn mới nên nhà vệ sinh chưa được tiện nghi lắm

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: phòng chill đó, hãy thử đi 😅

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Homestay nằm vị trí khá thuận tiện cho mình khi đến bến xe, lội bộ tầm 7 phút. Liên hệ với anh chủ qua WhatsApp nên việc nhận phòng rất dễ dàng và thoải mái với mã cổng. Cảm giác thoải mái như ở nhà. Có khu bếp nhỏ ở tầng lửng, cf sữa gói, mì gói miễn phí. Mình tự pha hoặc ăn mì rồi rửa úp lên kệ. Rất là ok và khá là chill.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Anh chủ thân thiện, mình muốn đi chợ nổi Ngã Năm nên thuê xe của home giá 140k/ngày. Xung quanh home có nhiều tiện ích có thể đi bộ :
1. Có 2 quán đồ ăn chay
2. 3 tiệm giặt ủi
3. 2 cửa hàng tiện lợi vmart & bách hoá xanh
4. Chùa đá Vĩnh Hưng
5. Gần bến xe & văn phòng tàu Superdong 
6. Chợ nhóm phường 2 kế ngân hàng Sacombank & Vincome

reviews.title: Good
reviews.positives:
+ Vị trí: cách bến xe tầm 6 phút đi bộ
+ Phòng: nhỏ gọn, khá xinh và chill. Cí bàn làm việc. Phòng có ghế bập bênh đọc sách. Mình rất thích cây đèn ngủ hình chú gấu
+ Ăn uông: quán chạy Phúc An gần home. 
+ Điểm cộng là anh chủ hỗ trợ đưa ra bến xe :)

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Anh chị chủ homestay rất nhiệt tình và thân thiện. Giá cả phải chăng; dịch vụ, tiện nghi rất tốt, phòng trang trí dễ thương và sạch sẽ. Homestay ở trung tâm thành phố nên dễ đi lại tham quan. 
Excellent experience at Mai Anh garden. Ricky and Mai Anh are very kind and friendly. They offered delicious food and great service at very affordable price. If I have a chance to visit Soc Trang again, I will still choose to stay here. Thank you Mai Anh garden for the experience once again.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: chỗ ở sạch, tiện nghi, anh chị quản lý nhiệt tình

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Ricky je skvělý a starostlivý hostitel, strávili jsme u něj pouze jednu noc, ale velmi nám pomohl při shánění autobusu do přístavu. Neustále se dotazoval, zda je vše v pořádku. Voda je k dispozici zdarma, pivko za pár drobných. Skvělá je i společná terasa s vybavenou kuchyňkou👍👍.

reviews.title: Exploring Soc Trang
reviews.positives: Super lokalita, veľmi blízsko autobusovej stanice. Celkovo hodnotím ubytovanie veľmi pozitívne, izba bola veľmi pekná a čistá. Ricky bol veľmi nápomocný, dokonca som mala zaobstarany aj bicykel, ktorý sa veľmi hodil na poznávanie mesta. Doporučujem ubytovanie u Rickymu každému kto sa chystá navštíviť Soc Trang.
reviews.negatives: Nenašla som nič čo by sa mi nepáčilo.

reviews.title: Good location but owner needs improve their service and facility
reviews.positives: We booked the queen room with garden view through Priceline. The location was great, close to many well known tourist attractions.
reviews.negatives: However, the room itself wasn't. There were no towels, hairdryer, slippers, or toilet paper in the toilet like stated on the booking website. We didn't find any mirrows or trash bins inside the room either which is something i have not seen before at any hotels or homestays that i have stayed at. The closet was smelly with somebody's dirty clothes on the bottom shelf. The shared toilet was ancient, outdated and in need of an upgrade badly.

reviews.title: Good stay for one night before leaving to con dao
reviews.positives: I had a balcony, good WiFi, good price and very close to the bus station. Furthermore, the owner was kind and gave me plenty of recommendations while helping me for my trips organisation
reviews.negatives:
Very very loud at night (maybe it was just that day but the walls were very thin and I could hear the karaoke and the honking from the busy street nearby)
There was some mold on the wall

reviews.title: Committed staff
reviews.positives: I only stayed one night because I was in transit between Côn Đảo and HCMC, but I had a very good experience. Ricky was very helpful even before I arrived at the hostel, assisting me with my travel arrangements to Sóc Trăng and then providing me with information on places to eat near the hostel and on how to continue my journey. I left Sóc Trăng feeling very grateful and at ease!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Thw owner is just really nice and helpful. Arranged the pick up for us straight at the hotel door with the bus to take us to the ferry. The shower was nice and hot and really clean bedrooms.
reviews.negatives: The beds were little hard for our taste.

reviews.title: Nice location for a short stay in Soc Trang
reviews.positives: The host Ricky is very nice. He kindly picked me up with his motorbike at the bus station and showed me everything in his house. The room is nice and the bed comfortable.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Ricky was really helpful and a great host

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Very close to bus stop. Excellent host who was very helpful and welcoming. Great comfortable budget accommodation.
reviews.negatives: Everything was great.

reviews.title: Cute place
reviews.positives: My room with a balcony was very nice. There are nice details all around, there was a lovely flower bouquet in the kitchen area. Hosts are helpful. Scooter rents, ready go go explore the region.

reviews.title: It is a very good choice in Soc Trang city
reviews.positives: The hotel owner is friendly and supportive. Free mineral water, instant noodle, coffee.
reviews.negatives: the light in WC did not work.

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.positives: Great terrace, great host
reviews.negatives: Sink was not working

reviews.title: Most helpful owner
reviews.positives:
* most helpful owner organized travel to Soc Trang 
* excellent pre-arrival communication
* owner knowledgeable about the Superdong boat to Con Dao
* location close to Superdong office, Mini.art, Restarants/Cafes

reviews.title: Nice
reviews.positives: The host couple were super friendly and willing to support us even it's late. I like the life here, very peaceful and the food is also not expensive. Will come back and book your homestay. Hope to see you again soon.

reviews.title: excellent hotel - very nice owners
reviews.positives:
superb room'
nice owners
family atmosphere
free bycicles
great facilities
reviews.negatives: we just coincide with construction work at the roof

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The hosts were finishing the renovation. Now the rooms have their own bathrooms. The location is very convenient, the bus station and the Superdong office are within walking distance. The hosts are also super nice and helpful.
reviews.negatives: The only minus comes from the noisy street, bring earplugs if you plan to sleep later than seven. This isn't a problem if you plan to catch the morning ferry, as you've got to wake up before six anyway.

reviews.title: Fantastic Hosts in a Authentic Soc Trang Homestay
reviews.positives:
The hosts made this place. They were very hospitable and helpful. They gave me a bicycle to use for free for one day, which was ideal explore the city. I wanted to visit nga nam markets and they gave me a scooter for $100k per day. I lost my phone during this trip, and Ricky assisted me to get a new one from his friend and even took me there to pick it up.

The room: bed is comfortable and there is a connecting balcony to use. You have toiletries provided. You have tv where you can stream youtube and other platforms. Great location, easy walk into the city and navigate through the scooters. 

There is a shared kitchen downstairs where you can cook if you need. They provided noodles, cake and drinking water. There are so many good food options from surrounding restaurants that i never used it - except to boil the kettle for noodles. They even provided a Soc Trang travel guide to assist with planning my trip.

Its a nice environment and great to experience vietnam homestay in Soc Trang.
reviews.negatives: The room was low budget and could do with some love. But the experience surpassed expectations that it didnt really matter to me.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Access to the centre and how the host treated me
reviews.negatives: Nothing.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Ricky, the owner is so kind and helpful! We stayed at his homestay just one night, but he treated us with the best way from the first moment! The room was so clean and cute! Totally recommend it!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Nice place, good value, friendly and helpful owners, good location for the bus station.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Comfortable, clean room with shower gel, shampoo, toothbrush. Free noodle, milk coffee, candy. Thanks Ricky help me to book mortor taxi

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Nice place for stayed. Near bus station & Suoerdong office. 
Walking some steps: 
- 2 mini market , convenience store
- 2 vegetarian restaurant 
- 2 laundry shop
And, you can walk to highland coffee, Vincome plaza
- Rent Ricky's motorbike to visit some pagodas

reviews.title: Good homestay!
reviews.positives:
Bathroom with free shampoo & body shower gel, tower. 
Mini kitchen free noodle, coffee, cookies & candy

reviews.title: Amazing stay, highly recommend !
reviews.positives: The room was very clean and confortable ! The staff was very friendly and gave us all the information we needed about how to get to the Tran De port.

reviews.title: Perfect for short stay - amazing host.
reviews.positives: Perfect stay for my short stop in Soc Trang. Ricky was a great host and easily contacted. The room was clean, tidy and spacious. Thank you. 🙏

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Value for staying. Host friendly & helpful. Bike free for use. Good place with shop, food, mini market & local market, you can walk to there. Near bus station & Superdong office.

reviews.title: Value & stay as your home
reviews.positives: Staying home once again from Con Dao Island. Nice rocking chair for rest. Thanks Ricky

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
1.a bike free 
2. Mini kitchen free with noodle, cake,water
3. Friendly host

reviews.title: Great location.
reviews.positives: Ricky was awesome. Great communication and even after realising we had only booked for 1 night instead of 2, he was totally accommodating.

reviews.title: Quick but nice trip passing through
reviews.positives: The homestay owner was very helpful, and helped me arrange a transfer to soc trang ferry for a reasonable price. The homestay itself was quite cute and quirky, with free snacks and a projector.

reviews.title: Perfect spot with exceptional host
reviews.positives: The owner went above and beyond to help me out and is just such a kind person, plus his English is great. I used their bicycle and am so grateful to have been able to explore because there are no places to rent a bicycle in town. My room was cute-kitsch and there is free water and instant ramen. Location is very central. Can’t recommend more!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Very friendly, helped me manage my bus reservations
The room was better then I thought. I wasn't expecting a videoprojector in the room.
It is a bit far from the center by foot (museum & pagoda) but there was a bike I could use. The city was pretty under the lights.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Ricky and Amy the hosts were super helpful. They sorted out motorbikes for us and gave good recommendations for near by activities. We also accidentally left something behind and Ricky kindly posted it to our next destination. What a star! Thanks again 😁

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Ricky - friendly host. help me book the bus from Cantho - Soc Trang with the straightly line( none stop or drop off outside the city) pick up & take me to straight his home. That's great !! :)
reviews.negatives: a free bike :)

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Nice & cute room. Good & friendly host !
reviews.negatives: kitchen is processing

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Very friendly and helpfull owner!

reviews.title: Great, great service!
reviews.positives: The room was very cozy, fruits and water was offered on arrival, a kitchen with a very nice terrace is available and they even have tea and instant noodles free of charge. Cold sodas and beer is available for a cheap price and all in all the service is amazingly friendly and helpful. I wish I could have stayed longer! The owner booked onward tickets for us and even communicated with the bus company several times to make sure that everything went smoothly!
reviews.negatives: Everything was perfect,

reviews.title: Great stay, perfect host
reviews.positives:
Situated in a little residential alleyway off a main road and right opposite one of the (many) pagodas in Soc Trang. That main road is a bit busy during the day but is quiet at night. The room is a good size and very clean. The bed is comfortable and in the room I had there's a nice rocking chair as well - it makes a nice space to just relax if you need some down time. Good aircon but also a fan so you don't need the aircon so much. 

The shared kitchen is a real plus- it's on a little terrace which is a lovely place to sit in the mornings and evenings. There's a shared fridge with drinking water (free) and other stuff like soft drinks, beer and some basic foodstuffs for a nominal price. 

It's a 20-30 minute walk to the centre and a riverside walk area, there are mini markets and a bigger supermarket closer than that. 

Ricky is the perfect host. From the moment I booked he sent me all the information he had on a festival taking place while I was there and also organised my transport to and from Soc Trang. You can borrow bicycles - when I arrived there was one ready which was too big for me and Ricky went out of his way to get hold of a smaller, more manageable one. There's some nice cycling heading out away from the city and it makes it far easier to visit some of the spectacular khmer pagodas. 
I was here for a week to coincide with the Ooc Om Boc festival and if I ever get the chance to be in this part of the world again at the right time of year, I would definitely come back here. 

Highly recommended.  

** I stupidly left a favourite jacket behind by mistake. When I messaged Ricky about it he had already found it, washed it and is in the process of getting it forwarded to me. Top marks!!
reviews.negatives: Nothing!

reviews.title: LOVE IT. I didn't take any picture of the room but lemme tell you it looked the same as the picture. The room was cl
reviews.positives: The atmosphere, the facility, the hospitality of the host, close to the bus station.
reviews.negatives: Only male shampoo equipped

reviews.title: High Recommend
reviews.positives: Good location ,perfect service and cheap price ...
reviews.negatives: nothing

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Great communication with the hosts! Ricky and Amy were both so kind and nice, they greeted us when we arrived, helped us organizing our shuttle to con dao and gave us some fresh fruit!
We kind of felt like home.
Room is nice with air conditioning.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: An amazing place with great value. The owner is incredibly helpful, offering lots of recommendations. Highly recommend it!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Spacious clean and fantastic value for money. The owner was lovely and was so so helpful ! Helped me book ferries and offered his bike for the evening

reviews.title: A comfortable homestay with people who treat you like family
reviews.positives: The host is fantastic, sorted out information for a shuttle bus for our next journey that we didn't even know about. Very patient and understanding during a mistake I made with payment.

reviews.title: Helpful host ( support clearly information )

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Nice room & friendly host. A tiny kitchen looks lovely. I can have tea time at the middle floor. Best place for look local people arround there.

reviews.title: Nice and friendly host, all you need and more!
reviews.positives: Ricky is very kind!

reviews.title: Nice guesthouse
reviews.positives: I had everything I need. Nice balcony in the room. There is also a rooftop. The owners are nice and I could use a bicycle for free, which was great. There is also a kitchen and free water refill.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
A nice homestay for short staying - 1 night then leave to Con Dao Island. Host is friendly & helpful. Ricky & Amy support 2 bikes for us. They showed us some places for visit with their bike free. Omg! That's amazing! Thanks Ricky & Amy. :)
There are full kitchen & washing machine on rooftop. We use all free !
reviews.negatives: Perfect ! Nothing to complain cause Ricky always ask us what we need about cleaning room & wc?!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Ricky is a wonderful host! Always helpful, telling you nice pagodas, where you can go, or where to eat. He organizes bicycles, and helps with the busses!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Nice homestay for short rest stop to Con Dao Island. Pleasure with Ricky & Amy free bike that they supported us while staying their home. And, We can use their kitchen free with noodle, cake, pure water. Enjoy beer while washing our clothes on their rooftop.
reviews.negatives: Nothing to complain cause Ricky always ask our need to service their cleaning room & wc. They are ready to do with best so that we fell comfortable while staying their homstay. Thank Ricky & Amy !!!

reviews.title: Perfect homestay !!! 10 mark !!
reviews.positives: Ricky & Amy are nice, friendly host. They gave us a lot of place- pagoda for visiting with their free bike. My room is neat, atractive with simple decorating. That's ok for back packer. Kitchen full topping with free noodle, cake & water. Cook as I do at my home
reviews.negatives: Nothing.

reviews.title: Nice & Cheap Homestay for Backpackers
reviews.positives:
Host :  friendly , helpful & hospitable
I met & made friends who are backpackers from Spain, Dutch from this homestay. Homestay is not perfect as hotel but it is too enought for me - a backpacker. I can cook some food at kitchen with microwave, washing free ( Ricky have some cake free for you at his kitchen). I can read on the rooftop while washing. 

Location: near center & some nice pagoda

Food: a lot of local food arround home. I can walk there 

Ferry agent to the Con Dao Island just 10 minutes from home. Or Ricky - Host can drive his car to the port 

Note:  That nice homestay for staying !
reviews.negatives: Nothing !

reviews.title: Central, cheap and nice Homestay
reviews.positives: Very central and super host who tried to help us as much as he could.
reviews.negatives: basic room but absolutely fine for the excellent price

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Localização boa, atendimento bom, boas dicas para Soc Trang.
